content.en:
The Fire Devouring Controller stared at Ye Tian and knew Ye Tian's identity at a glance.

As the eternal master, there is naturally a sense in the dark.

Moreover, he also heard that the Ten Elements Ancestor had recently accepted a personal disciple, if there was no accident, it was Ye Tian.

"The one who swallows the fire, this person is the one who has broken the rules of the Xuanlei Black Valley, and he is going to teach him a lesson. The Gulo Controller suggested.

However, the Fire Swallowing Master ignored the Gu Luo Master, and instead walked up to Ye Tian, bent down and said respectfully, "Fire Swallowing has seen Senior Brother!"

In the first line of Wanyuan Mountain, formal disciples have to call senior brother when they see their own disciples, and registered disciples naturally have to call senior brother when they see official disciples and personal disciples.

Even if he is an eight-domain level controller, Ye Tian is only a six-domain level controller, and the same is true.

He didn't dare to be disrespectful to Ye Tian in the slightest.

"Senior Brother Fire Swallowing doesn't need to be so polite. "

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Senior brother?"

Many Eternal Controllers were stunned, the Infinite Controller turned out to be the senior brother of the Fire Swallowing Master, and looking at the appearance of the Fire Swallowing Master, it seemed that he was very respectful to the Endless Master.

It is rumored that the master of the Fire Devouring Sect is a registered disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, although it has not been confirmed, it is very likely.

Then, the Infinite Master is also a disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, and he is not a registered disciple, but an official disciple or a personal disciple, otherwise the Fire Devouring Master would not be so respectful.

At this point, they were completely dumbfounded.

I thought that the Fire Devouring Master was here and was their backer, but it turned out to be the backer of the Endless Master.

"Everyone, I still have something to do, so I'll go first!"

The Gulo controller shuttled away directly.

Immediately, the other controllers also fled one by one, where did they dare to besiege Ye Tian, that was looking for death!

In a short time, the eternal masters here are gone.

"Senior brother, this time it's a small misunderstanding, so don't worry about them. If you have time, you can come to my Fire Swallowing City as a guest. "

Said the Fire Eater.

Ye Tian nodded slightly: "Okay!"

Afterwards, the Fire Swallowing Master chatted with Ye Tian for a few words and left.

Although the two of them are senior brothers, the Fire Devouring Controller and Ye Tian are not familiar with each other after all, and they are only the registered disciples of the Ten Elements Ancestor, so how can they be compared to Ye Tian.

Don't look at Ye Tian's cultivation now, but it won't be too long, and his strength will surpass that of the Fire Devouring Master.

In the following years, Ye Tian almost walked sideways, even if many people didn't know his identity, but after other eternal controllers said it, they knew that he had a relationship with the Fire Swallowing Master, he was the senior brother of the Fire Swallowing Master, and he was also a Six Domains-level combat power, who would dare to provoke Ye Tian.

As time slowly passed, Ye Tian snatched one after another Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits.

Finally, on this day, after Ye Tian refined another Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, the body of control completed a breakthrough.

Bang!!!

The body of control continued to transform and promote, from a fourth-level body of control to a fifth-level body of control, and the physical body became extremely powerful.

And with the breakthrough of the body of control, his strength has also completed the transformation.

"I should be a seventh-level master now!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The seven-domain level controller is already very underwhelmed, even if he encounters an eight-domain level master, he can escape if he can't beat it.

In the thirteenth boundary river, the seven-domain level master is definitely at the top level.

As far as he knew, the Qinglian controller was very powerful, but it was only a five-domain level controller.

The body of control has been raised to level five, and in addition, it has also absorbed enough Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, although it can continue to absorb it, but the effect of Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit is just that.

Ye Tian was ready to leave, after all, there was no point in continuing to stay in Xuanlei Black Valley.

So, he urged the Xuan Lei Seal to prepare to go out.

However.

As soon as he urged the Xuanlei Seal, he felt that something was wrong, this was not a passage to leave the Xuanlei Black Valley to the outside world, but to go to a certain space-time region in the deepest part of the Xuanlei Black Valley.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's figure disappeared, and the space-time distortion fluctuations left behind quickly recovered.

-----------------------

A land of thunder, Ye Tian appeared here.

At this moment, he was a little confused, but he quickly reacted.

"It turns out that the so-called great chance is not the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit of the Xuanlei Black Valley, the master didn't even say it, I thought the chance was really the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit. But it's right to think about it, many eternal masters of Xuanlei Black Valley can come over, as a task like Master's Honor, what is the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit? "

Ye Tian is looking forward to this great opportunity.

As he walked across the land of Razor, he soon spotted an invisible thunder being wandering around as if it had no stellar mind.

Ye Tian used the copying talent to spy on it, but he didn't perceive any of its talents.

Immediately, he reached out and grabbed this special life directly in his hand.

The next moment.

This special life unleashed a special lightning bolt that ignored his defenses and slashed directly at his will.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian's will was split like this, and he suddenly felt a burst of pain.

But soon, he found that his will had condensed somewhat.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian finally knew what the opportunity here was, this special life could enhance his willpower.

However, after the little guy hacked him, he wilted.

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and directly swallowed it with the secret of swallowing.

Then, a strange thunder power entered Ye Tian's will, constantly splitting his will.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's willpower continued to increase.

After some time, the power of the strange thunder was exhausted.

So, Ye Tian continued to look for other thunder beings.

There are still a lot of this kind of thunder life here, and the strength is not strong, and it is at the peak of the Legendary Realm Lord level, so it is easy to catch.

As one by one the thunder special beings were devoured by Ye Tian, his will power became stronger and stronger.

Until one day, Ye Tian's eternal will broke through from the early stage of the ninth order to the middle level of the ninth order.

At this time, his eternal will was much stronger than in the past, and his strength was naturally greatly improved.

But after reaching the middle of the Ninth Order Eternal Will, this special life was not of much value to him.

Immediately, Ye Tian collected a lot of this thunder special life and wanted to take them away.

However, just when Ye Tian used the Xuan Thunder Seal to leave, all these thunder special beings were gone.

Boundary river.

Ye Tian appeared here, his face full of loss and regret.

"It seems that it can't take away those thunder special lives. "

And at this time, the Xuanlei Seal on his hand was also completely shattered, which meant that this great opportunity was really gone.
